svg.title: The assurance chain
svg.desc: Quality is built in across the whole assurance chain. Six layers run top to bottom — EARS spec, FEATURE docs (BDD), UNIT assertions, COMPONENT assertions, CONNECTED-SYSTEM assertions, and STORY proofs as the proof terminal. Each transition between layers is guarded by a performance-delta gate. 100 percent coverage is the floor, not the goal, and the perf-delta gate runs with the STORY tests so a regression past budget does not merge.
